sentence_reviews.text: Continuous predictions are trained by penalizing distance from numerical targets.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction, classical ML and statistics coverage; landing page lines 45-48.
sentence_reviews.notes: Squared, absolute, and robust regression losses penalize deviations from numerical targets.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Statistics & experimental design.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Regression losses (MSE, MAE, robust) is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Statistics & experimental design and feeding downstream nodes such as Linear models & generalized linear models, Decision trees, random forests & boosted trees.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
